shopping_451.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The primary reason for failure is the misinterpretation of the objective's criteria "multi-colored word printed on it". The agent selected a shoe with multi-colored stripes, but there was no actual multi-colored *word* printed on the shoe. Although the selected shoe was the cheapest among the visible options, it did not meet the specific visual requirement.
shopping_451.REFLECTION: When an objective specifies a visual characteristic like "multi-colored word printed on it", it is crucial to perform a thorough visual inspection of product images to ensure all parts of the description are met. Do not confuse multi-colored patterns or designs with actual multi-colored text. After identifying products that meet all visual criteria, then proceed to compare prices to find the cheapest option.
